visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A male host with a black flat cap, glasses, and a black t-shirt speaks to the camera in a professional studio setting with soft lighting. A graphic of a white Tesla car and stylized Chinese text about Tesla taxis appear in the foreground. (2) A brief cut to a white SUV equipped with a large sensor array on its roof driving through a suburban street intersection during daylight. (3) The host returns, gesturing with his hands. Gold shimmering particles are added as a visual effect around his fingers to emphasize his points. (4) Exterior street footage shows a black Tesla Model Y performing a left turn at a busy urban intersection. Numerous pedestrians in casual summer clothing are waiting on the street corners. (5) The host continues his explanation, accompanied by digital icons of a lidar sensor and a map pin overlaying the screen. (6) Close-up shot of a small black camera embedded in a car's body, followed by a view of the vehicle's interior dashboard showing a 3D visualization of traffic and road lanes on the center touchscreen. (7) A graphic depicting several stylized figures working at computer monitors appears next to the host to represent a remote operations team. (8) A white Tesla sedan is shown driving along a scenic road bordering a body of water with a city skyline in the distance. (9) A high-angle shot of the Austin, Texas skyline with skyscrapers and a river in the foreground under a clear blue sky. (10) The host points toward the camera and makes closing remarks while the social media handles remain visible at the top left.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 特斯拉無人計程車正式上路了!. [Logo]: f 3c有意思tim哥. [Logo]: o 3ctim. (2) [Subtitle]: 我去美國出差體驗Waymo以後. (3) [Subtitle]: 特斯拉無人計程車也正式上路了. (4) [Subtitle]: 有美國網友就拍到一台寫著. [Slogan]: Robotaxi. [Slogan]: Model Y 自駕轉彎. (5) [Subtitle]: 這段影片呢被特斯拉高層轉發證實說. (6) [Subtitle]: 這就是傳說中的特斯拉的無人計程車. (7) [Subtitle]: 相較於其他自駕計程車. [Slogan]: 可用於測量目標的距離 靠光達還有. [Slogan]: 高精密的地圖為基礎. (8) [Subtitle]: 特斯拉則是選擇純視覺方案. [Slogan]: 純視覺方案. (9) [Subtitle]: 依照攝影機跟超音波感測器來搞定一切. [Slogan]: 攝影機. (10) [Subtitle]: 雖然號稱無人監管的一個模式. (11) [Subtitle]: 但仍會有遠端團隊即時監控這個車輛運行. (12) [Subtitle]: 目前特斯拉無人計程車初期. [Slogan]: 德州奧斯汀. (13) [Subtitle]: 會限定在德州的奧斯汀做一個試營運. (14) [Subtitle]: 所以有興趣的朋友可以去奧斯汀體驗看看.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main host, approximately 14 pedestrians visible in the street and skyline shots.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male wearing a black flat cap, black rimmed glasses, and a black t-shirt with a colorful Apple logo.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video alternates between a clean indoor studio with a blurred living room background and various outdoor urban locations in Texas, including street intersections and a city skyline by a river.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with an energetic male voice speaking Mandarin in a clear, well-enunciated professional tone. An upbeat, major-key electronic BGM with a strong percussive beat starts immediately. A faint 'confetti pop' SFX is heard. (2) As the host gestures, a high-pitched 'sparkling' or digital chime sound effect is introduced to highlight the visual animation. The BGM maintains a consistent tempo of 124 BPM. (3) A subtle digital 'whoosh' sound effect accompanies the transition between the studio footage and the street footage. The speaker's arousal level remains high, conveying excitement about the technology. (4) The vocal delivery continues at a fast pace with very few structural pauses. SFX for digital UI interaction or emphasis are heard briefly as graphics appear. (5) The track concludes with the host finishing his sentence while the music continues for a short second before fading out with the video.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Evidence -> Technical Explanation -> Location Info -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as an informative news commentary piece aiming to announce the launch of Tesla's autonomous Robotaxi service in Austin, Texas. It compares Tesla's vision-based technology to other competitors like Waymo and encourages viewers to experience the service themselves.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a classic 'social media tech influencer' format with high-energy narration, consistent BGM, and fast-paced visual graphics to maintain viewer engagement.
